name: Ricky Velez
bio: Ricky Velez is an American stand-up comedian, writer, and actor from Queens, New York. He co-wrote and co-starred in the 2020 film The King of Staten Island with his longtime friend Pete Davidson. His first stand-up special, Here's Everything, was released on HBO in 2021.

timeline.ev: Wins New Yorks Funniest Stand-Up at the New York Comedy Festival
Co-writes and co-stars in The King of Staten Island
HBO special Here's Everything is released

accolades: New Yorks Funniest Stand-Up, New York Comedy Festival (2014)
